QLPreviewReply  init(fileURL:) Initializerinit(fileURL:)iOS 15.0+iPadOS 15.0+Mac Catalyst 15.0+visionOS 1.0+init(fileURL: URL) Parameters fileURLA file URL representing a preview of the previewed URL. Currently supported types include: UTTypeImage, UTTypePDF, UTTypeHTML, UTTypeXML, UTTypePlainText, UTTypeRTF, UTTypeRTFD, UTTypeMovie, UTTypeAudio

Use this method to provide a preview by providing a URL to a file of a supported type.

# init(fileURL:) | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Quick Look ](/documentation/quicklook)

- [ QLPreviewReply ](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewreply)

- [ init(fileURL:) ](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewreply/init(fileurl:))

- [ QLPreviewReply ](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewreply)

-  init(fileURL:) 

Initializer# init(fileURL:)

iOS 15.0+iPadOS 15.0+Mac Catalyst 15.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
init(fileURL: URL)
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewreply/init(fileurl:)#parameters)

`fileURL`A file URL representing a preview of the previewed URL. Currently supported types include: UTTypeImage, UTTypePDF, UTTypeHTML, UTTypeXML, UTTypePlainText, UTTypeRTF, UTTypeRTFD, UTTypeMovie, UTTypeAudio

## [Discussion](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewreply/init(fileurl:)#discussion)

Use this method to provide a preview by providing a URL to a file of a supported type.
